subcodes.first_line: O Abá-Javád! Hearken thou unto the Call of the Lord of creation on this Day of Return: verily, there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا جواد ان استمع الندآء من مالک الایجاد فی یوم المعاد انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
